panels.title: Recent Workflow Executions
panels.description: Click an execution_id to drill into the step timeline and tool calls below.

targets.rawSql: SELECT started_at, execution_id, workflow_id, status, duration_ms, step_count, tool_call_count, coalesce(error_message, '') AS error FROM ploston.executions WHERE execution_type = 'workflow' AND $__timeFilter(started_at) ORDER BY started_at DESC LIMIT 100

panels.title: Step Timeline (execution: $execution_id)
panels.description: Visible when an execution_id is selected. Sequential view of step lifecycle.

targets.rawSql: SELECT step_id, attempt, step_type, status, started_at, duration_ms, tool_name, coalesce(error_message, '') AS error FROM ploston.steps WHERE execution_id = '$execution_id' ORDER BY started_at, attempt

panels.title: Tool Calls Within Steps (execution: $execution_id)
panels.description: Visible when an execution_id is selected. Shows params/response byte sizes and a 200-char preview.

targets.rawSql: SELECT step_id, sequence, tool_name, started_at, duration_ms, params_bytes, response_bytes, substring(params, 1, 200) AS params_preview FROM ploston.tool_calls WHERE execution_id = '$execution_id' ORDER BY started_at, sequence

list.name: execution_id
list.label: Execution ID
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT execution_id FROM ploston.executions WHERE execution_type='workflow' AND $__timeFilter(started_at) ORDER BY started_at DESC LIMIT 200
